column2: Eastside Chophouse invoice 4471 is 9 days past due, $640.00. Sofia to follow up by email.
Providence Manor (contact Karen Wells, kwells@providencemanor.com) wants 40 percent more banquet dessert volume. Renewal terms not signed. Hold pricing until David approves.
Flour cost step up of 15 percent has not yet been passed through to wholesale pricing. Review at the December P&L.
